title: Orthodon diantherus
taxonomy: Orthodon diantherus is a species of flowering plant that is classified within the family Asteraceae. This classification further divides into the subfamily Asteroideae and the tribe Astereae. The plant is native to the mountainous regions of China. Its classification is also reflective of its physical characteristics and growth habits. Further research may be needed to determine its full classification within the plant kingdom.
